current_posture.posture_statement: R16 active through R16-008 only; R16-009 through R16-026 remain planned only.

non_claims: generated baseline memory layers remain committed state artifacts, not runtime memory
generated baseline role memory packs remain committed state artifacts, not runtime memory
generated baseline role memory packs are not actual agents
generated baseline role memory packs do not perform work or workflow execution
memory pack validation report is a committed state artifact only
memory pack validation report is not runtime memory
memory pack validation report is not an artifact map
memory pack validation report is not an audit map
memory pack validation report is not a context-load planner
memory pack validation report is not workflow execution

accepted_stale_caveats.accepted_reason: Artifact generated_from_head/generated_from_tree boundary is stale relative to the detector invocation boundary and is preserved as an accepted R16-008 caveat for committed prior-task state artifacts.
accepted_stale_caveats.preserved_scope: R16-008 validation report accepts stale prior-task generated_from boundaries only as caveated state-artifact freshness findings.

findings.message: All 10 R16 memory layer types are present.
findings.expected: global_governance_memory, product_governance_memory, milestone_authority_memory, role_identity_memory, task_card_memory, run_session_memory, evidence_memory, knowledge_index_memory, historical_report_memory, deprecated_cleanup_candidate_memory
findings.actual: global_governance_memory, product_governance_memory, milestone_authority_memory, role_identity_memory, task_card_memory, run_session_memory, evidence_memory, knowledge_index_memory, historical_report_memory, deprecated_cleanup_candidate_memory

findings.message: All 8 generated role memory packs are present.
findings.expected: operator, project_manager, architect, developer, qa, evidence_auditor, knowledge_curator, release_closeout_agent
findings.actual: operator, project_manager, architect, developer, qa, evidence_auditor, knowledge_curator, release_closeout_agent

findings.message: Generated reports are not treated as machine proof.
findings.actual: no generated report machine-proof overclaim found

findings.message: Planning reports are not treated as implementation proof.
Runtime, agent, integration, retrieval/vector, artifact-map, audit-map, planner, envelope, handoff, and workflow overclaims are absent.
Only declared exact repo-relative source refs were inspected.
findings.expected: no broad scan and no wildcard refs

findings.message: No required exact source refs are missing.

artifact_statement: R16-008 memory pack validation report is a committed validation report state artifact only. It is not runtime memory, not an artifact map, not an audit map, not a context-load planner, and not workflow execution.
